mission_statement: Build a repeatable, auditable operations system that keeps fulfillment, inventory, returns, kiosk support, and forecasting running with low mistakes, so the business can scale without burnout.

tasks: Design and enforce stock control rules (receiving, put-away, transfers, access control)
Run discrepancy workflow: detect → investigate → correct → prevent
Oversee cycle counts (execution delegated; accountability stays)
Consolidate sales data signals (all channels/brands)
Produce restock proposal pack (Top SKUs, lead times, cash constraints)
Coordinate approval with leadership; execute supplier ordering via assigned buyer if applicable
Maintain weekly ops scorecard (few key metrics)
Maintain issue log + root-cause analysis + corrective actions
Capacity planning for peaks (Dec): staffing, cutoff rules, batching, buffer stock
Own the returns/fixes policy, reason codes, and exception approvals
Handle complex technical fixes only (LCD/rare repairs), and set “specialist windows” to avoid disrupting throughput
Ensure feedback loop from returns/reviews becomes process fixes
Publish SOPs/checklists for recurring processes
Train and certify Ops Assistant / kiosk leads on critical workflows

kpis.metric: Inventory discrepancy rate
Stockout incidents

mission_statement: Execute daily order fulfillment and customer operations accurately and consistently across 3 brands (temporary), maintaining packing quality, dispatch speed, and clean documentation, while supporting inventory execution tasks (counts/logs) as assigned.

tasks: Pick/pack/label orders for all brands under assigned workflows
Video record packing and upload per standard
Prepare dispatch batches; coordinate drop-off / handoff
Handle packing station setup/cleanup, supplies readiness
Bubble wrap cutting/prep and other packing admin (labels, pouches, tape, inserts)
Respond to Duoke/platform customer inquiries (status, basic questions)
Handle standard cases using templates
Route exceptions to Ops Manager (policy/complex cases)
Log cases properly (reason tags)
Receive returned parcels; log into returns tracker with reason code
Take photos/evidence; route to refund/replacement/repair workflow
Update customer on standard status (templated)
Assist in receiving POs: count on receipt, basic labeling/put-away
Perform assigned cycle counts (Top SKUs), report variances (no “silent corrections”)

kpis.metric: On-time dispatch %
Order accuracy %

mission_statement: Provide flexible coverage to keep the business stable during spikes by supporting fulfillment, CS, and kiosk ops as needed, while maintaining accuracy and clean logs.

tasks: Assist in packing/labeling/dispatch during volume spikes
Help with returns intake/logging and basic customer updates (templated)
Support receiving and put-away when POs arrive

key_responsibilities.area: Kiosk ops support (scheduled or as needed)
tasks: Cover shifts, breaks, or absences
Support stock replenishment and stock movement logging
Follow kiosk SOPs (open/close, cash, cleanliness)
Handle basic order status inquiries and platform messages using templates
Escalate exceptions to Ops Manager/COO per rules

kpis.metric: Coverage reliability: % of assigned relief shifts/tasks completed on time
Ops quality: packing/dispatch error incidents while they’re on duty
Kiosk compliance: checklist completion rate on shifts they cover

mission_statement: Run the kiosk daily with consistent SOP compliance and strong customer service, ensuring accurate cash handling, clean merchandising, and stock discipline while driving sales.

tasks: Opening checklist completion (setup, POS readiness)
Closing checklist completion (cash count, POS tally, lock-up)
Cash count at open + close
Record cash variance and escalate immediately
Maintain receipts/evidence per SOP
Greet, assist, recommend, close
Upsell/cross-sell where appropriate
Maintain basic product knowledge
Track stock movement (sales, replenishment, transfers)
Report low stock for Top SKUs
Participate in scheduled cycle counts (Top 20/Top 50 approach)
Maintain kiosk cleanliness
Ensure display is replenished and presentable

kpis.metric: Checklist compliance: % days opening + closing checklist completed with evidence
Cash variance rate: # variance incidents per week
Sales performance: daily sales vs target
Stock accuracy discipline: cycle count completion rate / stock log completeness

job_title: Commercial Channel Owner (Research + Targets + Channel Performance)
mission_statement: Drive growth by turning research into clear channel targets and ensuring execution hits targets through cadence, scorecards, and corrective actions (not by doing everything herself).

tasks: Own monthly campaign calendar per platform (Payday/Mega Sales/Flash Deals, etc.)
Own listing quality standards (images, copy, bundles, keywords, reviews response process)
Enforce promo rules (no margin-killing blanket discounts)
Competitive research per brand/channel (pricing, offers, positioning, demand)
Identify 1–3 high-confidence growth bets monthly (campaigns, bundles, offers, channels)
Validate channel roles (marketplace vs TikTok vs DTC vs bazaar) based on numbers
Set monthly targets per channel/brand (revenue + basic efficiency metric)
Produce channel plan: top SKU focus, promo plan, budget guardrails
Define “must-win” moments (Payday/Mega/seasonal) with expected output
Run weekly commercial review: what moved numbers + what’s broken + next actions
Trigger corrective actions (listing fixes, promo changes, offer changes, budget shift)
Escalate blockers to Ops/Finance/CEO with clear asks

kpis.metric: Channel contribution: Revenue + gross margin % by platform
ROAS / MER (whichever you use consistently) with trend
Conversion rate
Bazaar ROI: profit per event + “go/no-go” decision documented

mission_statement: Build a predictable wholesale revenue engine: pipeline → close → reorder/expansion, with disciplined pricing, account strategy, and retention.

tasks: Build target account list (retailers, corporate, gift resellers)
Outreach + meetings + proposals + follow-ups (disciplined deal flow)
Own partner onboarding and first successful order
Tier A/B/C accounts and engagement playbooks
Drive reorder cadence + upsell/cross-sell offers
Track churn risks and run reactivation plays
Follow pricing/discount guardrails; request approvals when needed
Ensure MOQ/margin thresholds are respected (no “bad deals”)

kpis.metric: Wholesale revenue vs target
Active accounts / reorder rate
Pipeline health: # qualified opportunities + expected value
Gross margin quality on wholesale

mission_statement: Build a stable, accountable team by owning hiring/admin, onboarding/training discipline, performance management, and team wellness, so operations and sales don’t collapse from people issues.

tasks: Contracts, attendance, disciplinary process, DOLE/requirements (as applicable)
HR templates + employee file management (organized, auditable)
Own onboarding checklist per role (kiosk, ops, sales)
Maintain training materials + certification checklist (who is trained on what)
Coordinate with Chris/Ops leads for process updates
Implement performance review cadence (monthly check-in + quarterly review)
Ensure each role has 3–4 KPIs/standards and that reviews happen
Run improvement plans (PIP) when needed, documented and fair
Own wellness initiatives and conflict resolution pathways
Run feedback loops (pulse checks) and escalate risks early (burnout, misalignment)

kpis.metric: Onboarding completion rate: % new hires fully onboarded by day 7/14
Performance cadence compliance: % reviews/check-ins completed on schedule
Retention/attendance health: absenteeism incidents trend or attrition
Training coverage: % staff certified for required role skills
